subject: fix(a11y): add aria-label to tag remove buttons, remove unused .section-title
body:
Replace :title with :aria-label on remove-tag buttons in
TransactionEditModal and ImportStepReview for screen reader support.
Remove .section-title from index.css — defined but never used.

Tags: a11y, cleanup, tailwind
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: tailwind-migration
Semver: patch
